title: Kevin Hart: Laugh at My Pain
original_title: Kevin Hart: Laugh at My Pain
overview: Experience the show that quickly became a national phenomenon. Get an up-close and personal look at Kevin back in Philly where he began his journey to become one of the funniest comedians of all time. You will laugh 'til it hurts!
